characters.name: Bibi Bubbles
characters.description: Bibi BubblesRelativesGrandfather (mentioned)AffiliationAmaziaPhysical descriptionSpeciesBubble maker humanoidGenderFemaleEye colorGreenBibi Bubbles Bibi Bubbles is a blue humanoid with pink hair. She is Amazias resident tour guide and can emit bubbles from her ears.

characters.name: Karoo
characters.description: KarooRelativesLil Rooey (baby cousin)Physical descriptionSpeciesKoalarooGenderMaleEye colorBrown Karoois a kangaroo and koala hybrid cub. He can jump like a kangaroo and likes to give hugs. He claims his favorite flavor is “blue” (he’s pretty suspicious if he can taste colors)

characters.name: Luna Petunia
characters.description: Luna PetuniaRelativesAunt ZuzuBiographical informationDate of birth2010Physical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleEye colorBrownLuna Petuniais the eponymous protagonist with sparkly blue hair and a flower skirt. She is able to access Amazia with her Aunt Zuzu's magical key necklace. Luna is a bubbly, headstrong six-year-old girl, who lives in the real world, but plays in a dreamland where she learns to make the impossible possible! With her adventurous spirit, Luna will try anything at least once. She is a curious and optimistic girl, who always encourages her friends to see their own potential. characters.name: Sammy Stretch
characters.description: Sammy StretchAliasesSammy Splendiferous Stretch (Full name)RelativesGrammyFather (mentioned as "Papa")Biographical informationPlace of birthAmaziaPhysical descriptionSpeciesAccordian RobotGenderMaleEye colorBlueSammy Stretch is an accordian and steampunk themed robot. He's a magician, a comedian, a train conductor and mechanic, and a musician. He can use his accordian limbs to stretch himself, and is fluent in the language "Jibberine" (Gibberish). Father (mentioned as "Papa")
